name: product-management-tools
description: Product management skills for creating and reviewing MVV, business requirements, PRDs, PBIs, priorities, and roadmaps.

interface.shortDescription: Create and review core product management artifacts.
interface.longDescription: A local Codex plugin with focused skills for mission, vision, values, business requirements, PRDs, product backlog items, prioritization, and product roadmaps.
defaultPrompt: Create a PRD for this product idea.
Review this roadmap for sequencing and feasibility.
Prioritize these PBIs and explain the tradeoffs.
